chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 1141 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of M.A- 5623 of 2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2021 Syed Tarique Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Ishrat Kabir Khan, Manager JPCL Jamshoro present in person. = Through instant petition, the petitioner challenges the legality of the Office Order dated 15.09.2020, issued by respondent No.4, whereby the petitioner was transferred from JPCL Jamshoro to NPGCL (GENCO-III) Muzaffargarh. He prays as under:- “a. That, this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to set-aside the impugned transfer order dated 15.09.2020, which is illegal, unlawful, without jurisdiction, based upon malafide intention and passed by the incompetent authority. b. That, this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to pass ad- interim order, thereby the operation of impugned transfer order dated 15.09.2020 may be suspended till the decision of present petition. c. Any other relief (s), which this Honourable Court deem, fit and proper may be granted.” A perusal of record shows that an issue with regard to terms and conditions of service pertain to petitioner and the respondents’ Company is involved in this petition. Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the matter at length could not satisfy the very maintainability of this petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed alongwith the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE S
